text.title: rag-eval-pipeline Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for rag-eval-pipeline as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Relying only on automated LLM metrics without any human validation pass.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLM evaluators disagree with human judgment on 20-30% of cases. Automated scores can be gamed by verbosity (high answer_relevance for long non-committal answers) and by context-parroting (high faithfulness for answers that copy context without reasoning).

failure-mode.description: Treating evaluation as a one-time pre-deployment gate rather than a continuous CI fixture.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: RAG quality degrades gradually as the corpus updates, the retrieval index drifts, or the LLM provider updates model weights. Without continuous evaluation, regressions are only discovered when users complain.
